cases.input: Compare Notion and ClickUp on collaboration capabilities and calculate the estimated annual cost for 20 users using each product's lowest publicly listed paid team plan, billed annually in USD.
cases.answer:

- Notion / collaboration capabilities: verified_present [E1]
- ClickUp / collaboration capabilities: verified_present [E5]
- Notion / annual cost for 20 users: unverified
- ClickUp / annual cost for 20 users: unverified

Cost:
- Notion (Paid Plans): $8.0/user/mo x 20 x 12 = $1920/yr [E2]
- ClickUp: $7.0/user/mo x 20 x 12 = $1680/yr [E2]

Recommendation:
The verified evidence does not establish a unique winner. Confirm the unverified items that matter to your team before deciding.

evidence.content: ClickUp vs Notion in 2026 [Features, Pricing & More Compared] Project Management Project Management Software Comparisons ClickUp vs Notion in 2026: Features, Cost and Security Compared Cloudwards.net may earn a small commission from some purchases made through our site. However, any earnings do not affect how we review services. Learn more about our editorial integrity and research process . Project Management Menu Key Takeaways: Notion vs ClickUp The main difference between ClickUp and Notion is that ClickUp’s more advanced tools make it better for complex projects. ClickUp’s free plan is ideal for small teams, while Notion’s free option only supports individuals. ClickUp is better for project managers who like using native integrations and automations. Notion offers few native integrations and zero native automations. 4.45 3.85 Affordable paid plans Strong collaboration tools Multiple task view options Great for notes & to-do lists Decent project management Unlimited users on Team plan Visit ClickUp $7 / month (save 30%) (All Plans) Visit Notion App $10 / month (save 16%) (All Plans) ClickUp and Notion are both listed in our roundup of the best project management software for good reason, so we understand why you may be having difficulty choosing between these user-friendly project management tools. Join us to find out which option is best for you in our ClickUp vs Notion comparison. After extensive testing, we can tell you that ClickUp and Notion are great for remote teams who need powerful real-time document creation tools and solid task management features. They’re also good choices for those looking for competitively priced software. For us, one of the tools stands out just above the other. You can find out which software takes the crown below. 03/28/2025 Facts checked We added more details about each provider’s key features and offerings. 07/23/2025 Facts checked We updated the article to include the latest features for Notion and ClickUp. updates How Did We Rate ClickUp vs Notion?
